name: Ancient India RPG
description:
Welcome to ancient India, where the gods walk among mortals and the very air hums with divine power. In this land of timeless legends, sacred rivers flow with cosmic energy, and mighty kingdoms rise and fall under the watchful eyes of celestial beings. From the towering temples of Vishnu to the dense forests of the rakshasas, every corner of this vibrant world holds mysteries waiting to be uncovered.

You can roleplay as anyone and explore this mystical land where the gods and mortals coexist, what tales of dharma and destiny await you?

Ambience Music
creator: Batkanac
